birds.name: Lilac-breasted Roller
birds.description: Famous for its stunning colors and acrobatic flight displays. A territorial bird often seen perched on acacia trees.
birds.location: East Africa — open woodlands and savannas

birds.name: African Fish Eagle
birds.description: A large eagle with a powerful build. Its distinctive cry is often described as the voice of Africa.
birds.location: Near large lakes, rivers, and dams across sub-Saharan Africa
birds.bestTime: All day · most active hunting in the morning

birds.name: Kori Bustard
birds.description: Africa's largest flying bird, known for its long legs and impressive size. Spends most of its time on the ground.
birds.location: Serengeti and Maasai Mara open plains
birds.bestTime: Year-round · easily spotted in open plains

birds.name: Shoebill
birds.description: A very large stork-like bird with a massive, shoe-shaped bill, found in Central and East Africa.
birds.location: Freshwater swamps and marshes, especially Uganda and Zambia
birds.bestTime: Early morning & late afternoon, when hunting fish

birds.name: Secretarybird
birds.description: A large, terrestrial raptor with a crested head and long legs, famous for stomping on snakes to kill them.
birds.location: Open grasslands and savannas of Africa
